name: moraine
description: Codex plugin for Moraine MCP session search and realtime agent awareness.

interface.shortDescription: Search local agent sessions from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Connects Codex to Moraine MCP session search, realtime agent awareness, and bundled guidance for recovering prior agent context.
defaultPrompt: Search my past agent sessions with Moraine.
Check what another agent is doing now.
Find prior context for this issue.
